style: Square dark fantasy ARPG inventory slot bitmap frame. No item, no text, no SVG, no diagonal shine.

ontology.clause: ONTOLOGY ACTIVE: item slots must support quick recognition, stable icon centering, and low-noise loot comparison.

prompt: Create one square game-ready bitmap UI asset: a single empty inventory slot frame for a Diablo-like dark fantasy ARPG. Deep black recessed center, beveled aged iron rim, tiny tarnished brass corner pins, subtle scratched metal and stone texture, premium hand-painted realism, readable at small size. No item object, no symbol, no text, no letters, no numbers, no UI label, no glow beam, no white diagonal shine. Avoid SVG, vector icon, CSS gradient, flat mockup, glossy plastic, cute cartoon, MapleStory style, neon, lens flare, busy ornament. The slot must feel like real dark fantasy game UI material.
acceptance: A single empty slot frame with dark center.
No embedded item, text, symbol, or white diagonal shine.
Looks like painted bitmap material, not SVG or CSS.
